doc_name: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resource Raising Norms).pdf

actionables.object: bonds with a minimum maturity of seven years to raise resources to finance eligible infrastructure/affordable housing lending
actionables.trigger_or_condition: for financing (1) lending to long term projects in all infrastructure sub-sectors; and (2) individual housing loans under affordable housing sub-sector
actionables.evidence_quote: A bank can issue long-term bonds with a minimum maturity of seven years for the purpose of raising resources to finance
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Ensure bond proceeds are deployed only for the stated purposes in Harmonized Master List infrastructure sub-sectors / affordable housing.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: matches para 4 text ('A bank can issue long-term bonds...' with minimum maturity and purposes).

actionables.action: be fully paid, redeemable and unsecured
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The instrument shall be fully paid, redeemable and unsecured.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Reflect instrument features in term sheet/issuance documentation.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in para 5(2) Type of bond.

actionables.action: rank pari-passu with other uninsured, unsecured creditors
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: They shall rank pari-passu with other uninsured, unsecured creditors.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Ensure ranking clause is included in offer document and debenture trust deed (as applicable).
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears immediately after para 5(2) Type of bond.

actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds shall be denominated in Indian Rupees.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Restrict issuance currency to INR in product setup and documentation.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in para 5(3) Currency of issue.

actionables.action: have a minimum maturity period of seven years
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds shall have a minimum maturity period of seven years.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Configure issuance systems to prevent tenor < 7 years.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in para 5(4) Maturity period.

actionables.action: issue long-term bonds without restriction on quantum
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing such bonds
actionables.evidence_quote: There shall be no restriction on the quantum of such bonds issued by a bank.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: No RBI-imposed cap stated; ensure internal limits/board approvals (if any) are followed.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in para 5(5) Quantum of Issue.

actionables.action: obtain prior approval from the Reserve Bank
actionables.object: incremental infrastructure and affordable housing loans acquired from other banks or financial institutions, to be reckoned for regulatory incentives
actionables.trigger_or_condition: if incremental infrastructure and affordable housing loans are acquired from other banks or financial institutions and are to be reckoned for regulatory incentives
actionables.evidence_quote: Any incremental infrastructure and affordable housing loans acquired from other banks or financial institutions shall require prior approval
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Create approval workflow and evidence retention before counting acquired loans towards incentive computation.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: para 5(5) includes this 'shall require prior approval from the Reserve Bank' condition.

actionables.action: issue the bonds in plain vanilla form without embedded call or put option
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds shall be issued in plain vanilla form, without any embedded call or put option.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Disallow callable/puttable features in product governance/term sheet templates.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in para 5(6) Options.

actionables.action: issue the bonds with either a fixed or floating rate of interest
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds may be issued with either a fixed or floating rate of interest.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Document chosen interest structure in issuance documents.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in para 5(7) Rate of interest.

actionables.action: reference the floating rate of interest to a market determined benchmark
actionables.trigger_or_condition: in the case of floating rate bonds
actionables.evidence_quote: In the case of floating rate bonds, the rate of interest shall be referenced to a market determined benchmark.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Ensure benchmark selection and fallback language are captured in the term sheet.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in para 5(7) Rate of interest.

actionables.action: issue the bonds through a public issue or private placement
actionables.trigger_or_condition: in full compliance with applicable SEBI guidelines and norms, including mandatory credit rating and listing
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds may be issued through a public issue or private placement, in full compliance with the applicable guidelines
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Map issuance route to SEBI requirements; ensure credit rating and listing steps are completed where mandated.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded to provided excerpt: sentence appears in para 5(8), though the excerpt is truncated after 'prescribed'.

actionables.action: treat the bonds as eligible for deposit insurance
actionables.trigger_or_condition: for long-term bonds issued under these Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds shall not be eligible for deposit insurance.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Ensure customer disclosures/offer documents do not state deposit insurance coverage for these bonds.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in para 5(9) Eligibility for deposit insurance.

actionables.action: comply with all relevant statutory and regulatory requirements
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds
actionables.evidence_quote: A bank issuing long-term bonds shall be required to comply with all relevant statutory and regulatory requirements.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Maintain a compliance checklist covering RBI, SEBI and other applicable requirements for each issuance.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded to provided excerpt: para 5(10) begins 'A bank issuing long-term bonds shall be required to comply with all relevant statutory and reg…' (text truncated but clearly matches obligation).

actionables.action: exclude the bonds from computation of net demand and time liabilities (NDTL) for CRR/SLR
actionables.trigger_or_condition: for long-term bonds issued to finance infrastructure loans and affordable housing loans
actionables.thresholds: Exemption subject to ceiling of “Eligible Credit” (EC) in paragraph 6(1)
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds will be exempted from computation of net demand and time liabilities (NDTL)
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Adjust CRR/SLR computation to exclude eligible bonds, while tracking EC-linked ceiling.
actionables.validation_notes: Not grounded in the provided source excerpt for node 0003: no NDTL/CRR/SLR exemption wording appears in the text shown (likely in missing para 6, not provided).

actionables.action: apply the NDTL exemption only up to the Eligible Credit (EC) ceiling
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when claiming/applying CRR/SLR exemption for such bonds
actionables.evidence_quote: this exemption will be subject to a ceiling of the “Eligible Credit” mentioned in paragraph 6(1)
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Implement controls to cap exempted amount at EC and retain workings used for reporting Fridays / March 31 computations.
actionables.validation_notes: Not grounded in the provided source excerpt for node 0003: the quoted EC ceiling/exemption text is not present in the sections shown (likely in missing para 6, not provided).

actionables.object: in respect of any matter covered herein
actionables.trigger_or_condition: if it considers necessary, for giving effect to the provisions or removing difficulties in application/interpretation
actionables.evidence_quote: the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein
actionables.implementation_notes: Monitor RBI clarifications and update internal policy/procedures accordingly.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: matches clause 12 language in node 0007.

actionables.action: treat the RBI’s interpretation as final and binding
actionables.object: interpretation of any provision of these Directions
actionables.trigger_or_condition: whenever RBI issues an interpretation under these Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
actionables.implementation_notes: Operationalize a process to ingest RBI interpretations and ensure consistent application across the bank.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded: exact sentence appears in clause 12 (node 0007). Modality is unambiguous ('shall').

actionables.action: comply with these Directions from their effective date
actionables.object: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resource Raising Norms) Directions, 2025
actionables.trigger_or_condition: once the Directions are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank
actionables.effective_date: on the day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank
actionables.evidence_quote: These directions shall become effective on the day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank.
actionables.implementation_notes: Track publication date on RBI website as the compliance start date for all requirements in these Directions.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed SHALL effective-date clause (para 2).

actionables.actor: commercial banks (excluding SFBs, LABs, PBs and RRBs)
actionables.action: treat these Directions as applicable to them
actionables.object: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resource Raising Norms) Directions, 2025
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when determining scope/applicability of the Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: These Directions shall be applicable to commercial banks ... excluding Small Finance Banks (SFBs), Local Area Banks (LABs), Payments Banks (PBs) and Regional Rural Banks (RRBs).
actionables.implementation_notes: Confirm entity type falls within scope before applying issuance permissions/conditions under Chapter II.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed SHALL applicability clause (para 3).

actionables.action: restrict regulatory incentives to bonds used to incrementally finance long term projects in infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.object: regulatory incentives on issuance/deployment of proceeds from such bonds
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when claiming/availing regulatory incentives for long-term bonds
actionables.evidence_quote: the regulatory incentives shall be restricted to the bonds that are used to incrementally finance long term projects in infrastructure sub-sectors.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Maintain traceability of bond proceeds to incremental eligible lending to support any incentive computation/claims.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed SHALL restriction in para 5(5) on regulatory incentives.

actionables.action: ensure compliance is in addition to (and not in derogation of) other applicable laws/rules/regulations/directions in force
actionables.object: other laws, rules, regulations, or directions for the time being in force
actionables.trigger_or_condition: while implementing these Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws
actionables.source_location: B. Application of other laws not barred (pp.7-7)
actionables.implementation_notes: Do not treat these Directions as replacing other statutory/regulatory obligations (e.g., SEBI issue/listing requirements).
actionables.validation_notes: Missed SHALL clause 11 (interaction with other laws).

actionables.action: treat actions taken/initiated under repealed directions as continuing to be governed by those repealed provisions
actionables.object: actions taken or purported to have been taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions/instructions/guidelines
actionables.trigger_or_condition: notwithstanding repeal under clause 9
actionables.evidence_quote: any action taken ... or initiated under the repealed Directions ... shall continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
actionables.implementation_notes: For legacy issuances/approvals under repealed frameworks, retain compliance approach per the earlier provisions as required by clause 10.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed SHALL saving clause 10 (effect of repeal on prior actions).
